name: Shizulu Capability Booster
description: Gives Shizulu the strongest legitimate ADB-grantable app permissions and app-ops available without root.

commands.exec: cmd appops set com.shizulu.manager GET_USAGE_STATS allow 2>/dev/null || appops set com.shizulu.manager GET_USAGE_STATS allow 2>/dev/null || true
cmd appops set com.shizulu.manager MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE allow 2>/dev/null || appops set com.shizulu.manager MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE allow 2>/dev/null || true
cmd appops set com.shizulu.manager RUN_IN_BACKGROUND allow 2>/dev/null || appops set com.shizulu.manager RUN_IN_BACKGROUND allow 2>/dev/null || true
cmd appops set com.shizulu.manager RUN_ANY_IN_BACKGROUND allow 2>/dev/null || appops set com.shizulu.manager RUN_ANY_IN_BACKGROUND allow 2>/dev/null || true
cmd appops set com.shizulu.manager GET_USAGE_STATS default 2>/dev/null || appops set com.shizulu.manager GET_USAGE_STATS default 2>/dev/null || true
cmd appops set com.shizulu.manager MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE default 2>/dev/null || appops set com.shizulu.manager MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE default 2>/dev/null || true
cmd appops set com.shizulu.manager RUN_IN_BACKGROUND default 2>/dev/null || appops set com.shizulu.manager RUN_IN_BACKGROUND default 2>/dev/null || true
cmd appops set com.shizulu.manager RUN_ANY_IN_BACKGROUND default 2>/dev/null || appops set com.shizulu.manager RUN_ANY_IN_BACKGROUND default 2>/dev/null || true
